headline: Is Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) One of the Best Long Term Stocks to Buy Under $20?
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:NCLH) is one of the best long term stocks to buy under $20. Bernstein initiated coverage of Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:NCLH) with a Market Perform rating on June 3 and set a price target of $18. The firm stated that it has a “structurally bullish view” on the cruise […]
